name: aionis-lite
description: Single-user local Aionis runtime with SQLite-backed memory, replay, and playbook-driven automation.

scripts.build: npm run -s build:runtime-host && npm run -s runtime-core:build && npm run -s build:app:lite
scripts.test:lite: node --test scripts/ci/lite-startup-contract.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-source-scope.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-release-baseline.test.mjs && npx tsx --test scripts/ci/lite-automation-kernel.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-health-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-error-contract.test.ts
